name: happy2_pose
frames: Pose: standing, her right arm (viewer's left) raised straight up high waving hello, open hand leaning slightly toward the LEFT edge of the image, big cheerful open-mouth smile, sparkling happy eyes, other arm relaxed at her side.

Pose: standing, her right arm (viewer's left) raised straight up high waving hello, open hand leaning slightly toward the RIGHT edge of the image, big cheerful open-mouth smile, sparkling happy eyes, other arm relaxed at her side.
